info.title: Goable API
info.description: Multi-tenant suitability scoring for outdoor activities across water, snow, air, and land families. Real-time forecast scoring, probabilistic ensembles, LLM intelligence narratives, historical + climate-decadal projections, personalized decision agent, counterfactual analysis, and parametric underwriting.

apiKey.name: X-Goable-Key
apiKey.description: API key issued per tenant — canonical production header is `X-Goable-Key`. The API also accepts `Authorization: Bearer <key>` for legacy callers but new integrations should use the X-Goable-Key form. Format: 48-char token; prefix (first 16 chars) is DB-indexed, full token SHA-256 hashed. Mint a key from the tenant portal at https://console.goable.io/portal/keys.

payoutAmount.description: Null for mixed-currency portfolios; the breakdown lives on the underlying quote.

trigger.description: Frozen at bind time — same shape as the quote's normalised trigger.

policyTerms.description: Frozen snapshot of the per-spot profile + payout terms — decouples the policy from later catalog changes.

trigger.description: Normalised trigger echoed back with defaulted consecutiveHours/cooldownHours.

tier.description: Sub-spot tier (1/2/3) applied to the tier risk multiplier; null when no sub-spot resolved.

tierSource.description: Provenance of the tier: 'catalog' from profile YAML, 'classifier' from L11 confidence=1.0 override, null when no tier applied.

tier.description: Sub-spot tier (1/2/3) applied to the tier risk multiplier; null when no sub-spot resolved.

tierSource.description: Provenance of the tier: 'catalog' from profile YAML, 'classifier' from L11 confidence=1.0 override, null when no tier applied.

tierMultiplierWeightedAvg.description: Weighted-average tier risk multiplier applied across spots in this currency (1.0 when no sub-spot).
Weighted-average tier risk multiplier applied across spots in this currency (1.0 when no sub-spot).
Weighted-average tier risk multiplier applied across spots in this currency (1.0 when no sub-spot).
Weighted-average tier risk multiplier applied across spots in this currency (1.0 when no sub-spot).

underlying.description: HistoricalScoreDistribution — object for single spot, array for portfolio.

quoteId.description: Present when the policy store is wired — pass to /v1/underwriting/policy/bind to bind this quote.

expiresAt.description: ISO timestamp after which the quote can no longer be bound.

boundPolicyId.description: Present on GET after the quote has been bound — the resulting policy id.

get.summary: Readiness probe (DB + skill lookup + LLM config)

post.summary: Score an activity at a location + time window

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Daily safety cap for this endpoint + plan (not the monthly billing quota). Omitted on unlimited (Scale) plans.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current UTC-midnight daily window. Omitted on unlimited (Scale) plans.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) at which the daily window resets. Omitted on unlimited (Scale) plans.

402.description: Plan upgrade required (ensemble or rider_skill_level on Free/Starter)

429.description: Daily rate limit (safety cap) exceeded for this endpoint + plan.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the daily rate-limit window resets. Present only on this 429 response.

post.summary: Time-series scoring across a window
Score multiple activities at one location
Historical climatology scoring (Pro+)
post.description: Percentiles + exceedance + verdict frequency over ERA5 reanalysis. Each entry carries a historical-mode ConfidenceDetail block (see components.schemas.ConfidenceDetailHistorical).

200.description: Percentiles + exceedance + verdict frequency (per-entry confidenceDetail: historical)

post.summary: Multi-spot portfolio scoring with joint variance
Counterfactual analysis: binding constraint + sensitivities + best window/spot

natural_language.description: LLM explanation. Available on any plan (Anthropic BYOK) — resolves the tenant's own Anthropic key set via PUT /v1/tenant/llm-key; no key configured degrades to a deterministic template (natural_language.degraded_mode=true) rather than an error.

200.description: binding_constraint + marginal_sensitivities + best_window_24h + best_nearby_spots + optional natural_language

post.summary: Personalized go/no-go decision (any plan — Anthropic BYOK)

user_pseudonym.description: SHA256(user_id + secret)[:32], hex ≥32 chars. NEVER PII.

200.description: score + verdict + decision block + degraded_mode + advisory_notice. Available on any plan; the LLM reasoning narrative requires the tenant's own Anthropic key (PUT /v1/tenant/llm-key) — without one, degraded_mode=true and a deterministic template is returned instead of an error.

delete.summary: GDPR Art. 17 right-to-erasure for a pseudonym

post.summary: LLM narrative explanation of a score (L2c, any plan — Anthropic BYOK)
post.description: Requires the tenant to have its own Anthropic key set via PUT /v1/tenant/llm-key — no longer plan-gated. No key configured → 503 INTELLIGENCE_UNAVAILABLE.

schema.description: Provide exactly one of scoreResult or session_id.

503.description: No Anthropic key configured for this tenant

post.summary: LLM multi-slot briefing (L2c, any plan — Anthropic BYOK)
post.description: Requires the tenant to have its own Anthropic key set via PUT /v1/tenant/llm-key — no longer plan-gated. No key configured → 503 INTELLIGENCE_UNAVAILABLE.

503.description: No Anthropic key configured for this tenant

put.summary: Set/rotate the tenant's Anthropic API key (Anthropic BYOK)
put.description: Validates the key with one cheap Anthropic API call before storing. Encrypts at rest (AES-256-GCM); the plaintext key is NEVER echoed back by this or any other endpoint. Available to any authenticated plan. Rate-limited (this call itself makes one real Anthropic API request).

apiKey.description: The tenant's own Anthropic API key (sk-ant-...).

422.description: Validation error, or Anthropic rejected the key (LLM_KEY_INVALID)

503.description: BYOK storage or BYOK_MASTER_KEY not configured on this deployment

get.summary: Get the tenant's Anthropic key status (Anthropic BYOK)
get.description: Never returns the key — only whether one is set, its last 4 characters, and timestamps.

503.description: BYOK storage not configured on this deployment

delete.summary: Remove the tenant's Anthropic key (Anthropic BYOK)
delete.description: Hard-deletes the stored ciphertext. LLM routes revert to the no-key degraded/503 path for this tenant.

503.description: BYOK storage not configured on this deployment

post.summary: Climate-decadal activity viability projection (Scale)
post.description: Per-decade projection distributions. Each entry carries a climate-mode ConfidenceDetail block (see components.schemas.ConfidenceDetailClimate).

post.summary: Parametric underwriting quote (Scale)
post.description: Multi-currency `expectedPremium.byCurrency` — a mixed-currency portfolio returns per-currency stats with no FX conversion. `policy.spot.tier` / `policy.portfolio[i].tier` echo the resolved sub-spot tier (1/2/3) or null when no sub-spot covers the point; `tierSource` marks whether it came from the catalog YAML or L11's data-driven classifier.

schema.description: Provide exactly one of spot or portfolio.

200.description: Premium + policy echo (with per-spot tier + tierSource) + bindable quote id when policy store is wired

422.description: Validation error / low confidence / invalid trigger

get.summary: Fetch a bindable quote by id (Scale)
get.description: Tenant-scoped read of a quote created via POST /v1/underwriting/quote. Returns the same body shape as the create response (with the optional `boundPolicyId` populated once the quote has been bound).

200.description: Quote record (may include boundPolicyId when already bound)

404.description: Quote not found for this tenant

post.summary: Bind a parametric policy (Scale)
post.description: Convert a bindable quote (≤24h old) into a bound policy for a specific coverage year. Returns the serialised policy + the quoteId + optional `driftAdvisories` — a soft warning surfaced when the resolved cell has an open watch-level L9 drift event. A warning/critical drift event at bind time REFUSES the bind with 422 DRIFT_ACTIVE (see the 422 response). Fires the `underwriting.policy.bound` webhook on success. Supports the optional `Idempotency-Key` header (see parameter description) so a client-side retry after a network timeout can't double-bind.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional client-generated key (unique per logical request, scoped to your tenant). A retry with the SAME key and the SAME request body replays the original response verbatim without re-executing the request. A retry with the same key and a DIFFERENT body, or one that arrives while the original is still in flight, returns 409 IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_CONFLICT. Claims expire after 24h.

driftAdvisories.description: Soft warnings for cells with an open watch-level L9 drift event. Present only when non-empty.

404.description: Quote not found for this tenant

409.description: Quote already bound to another policy (QUOTE_ALREADY_BOUND), or IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_CONFLICT — a request with this Idempotency-Key is still in flight, or was already used with a different request body

422.description: Validation error / quote expired / quote not issuable / catalog drift / DRIFT_ACTIVE (open warning or critical drift event on resolved cell — `detail.openDriftEvents` lists each blocking cell)

get.summary: List bound policies for the caller's tenant (Scale)
get.description: Paginated list of every bound policy owned by the calling tenant. Ordered by boundAt DESC.

get.summary: Fetch a single policy by id (Scale)

post.summary: Re-evaluate a bound policy against historical replay (Scale)
post.description: Runs the trigger walk against the historical archive for the policy's coverage year and inserts any newly detected payout events. No request body. Fires the `underwriting.policy.triggered` webhook the first time new events are inserted.

200.description: Policy + payout events + counts of newly inserted / skipped

422.description: Policy in a terminal state (settled / expired)

503.description: Policy persistence or HistoricalProvider not configured

post.summary: Settle a bound policy (platform-ops only)
post.description: PLATFORM-OPS ONLY — requires the `platform_admin` scope (cross-tenant Goable/underwriter operation, not a policyholder self-service action). Records the settlement wire reference + freezes the payout, and fires the `underwriting.policy.settled` webhook. Normally invoked by the daily settlement cron; use manually only for out-of-band settlement.

422.description: Validation error or policy not in a settleable state

post.summary: Report observed outcome for a scored session
post.description: Close the calibration loop. Submit the actual outcome (ran/cancelled/no_show/rescheduled/note) of a /v1/score session. The calibration pipeline + forecast verification + drift monitor consume these. Requires the `outcomes:write` scope (live keys carry it by default; test keys don't). Supports the optional `Idempotency-Key` header (see parameter description) so a client-side retry can't record the same outcome twice.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: Session UUID returned in the /v1/score response metadata.

parameters.name: Idempotency-Key
parameters.description: Optional client-generated key (unique per logical request, scoped to your tenant). A retry with the SAME key and the SAME request body replays the original response verbatim without re-executing the request. A retry with the same key and a DIFFERENT body, or one that arrives while the original is still in flight, returns 409 IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_CONFLICT. Claims expire after 24h.

202.description: Accepted (queued for the next calibration batch)

409.description: IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_CONFLICT — a request with this Idempotency-Key is still in flight, or was already used with a different request body

post.summary: L15 intrinsic-difficulty atlas lookup (Pro+)
post.description: Returns the per-dimension intrinsic difficulty curve δ(x) for the sub-spot the (activity, location) resolves to. Pure atlas read — no scoring, no weather fetch. 404 NO_DIFFICULTY_ATLAS when the sub-spot resolves but no atlas row exists yet (dormant cell — communicated honestly rather than synthesised).

200.description: Per-dimension intrinsic difficulty curves for the resolved sub-spot

404.description: No profile for activity, or no atlas row for the resolved sub-spot

post.summary: Spot recommender — inverse query (L10)
post.description: Given (activity, region center, radius, window) → top-K ranked sub-spots in the catalog. Composition of L1-L3 scoring + L4.6 confidence + L6 personal blend (Pro+, when pseudonym supplied). Plan caps: radius 25/50/200/1000 km, topK 5/10/20/50 across Free / Starter / Pro / Scale. Personalization Pro+ only. Hard-gated candidates (lightning ≥ 0.85, AQI hazardous) are dropped from results; `allGated=true` distinguishes 'all in-radius spots were unsafe' from 'no spots in radius at all'.

userPseudonym.description: Optional booking-platform-side pseudonym. When present, Pro+ tenants get personalization via the L6 cold-start blend (cap 0.5 weight).

200.description: Ranked top-K sub-spots + observability metadata. The optional `coverage` field appears only on empty results from a catalog gap (not from hard-gating).

X-RateLimit-Limit.description: Daily safety cap for this endpoint + plan (not the monthly billing quota). Omitted on unlimited (Scale) plans.

X-RateLimit-Remaining.description: Requests remaining in the current UTC-midnight daily window. Omitted on unlimited (Scale) plans.

X-RateLimit-Reset.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) at which the daily window resets. Omitted on unlimited (Scale) plans.

402.description: Plan limit exceeded (radius or topK above plan cap)

429.description: Daily rate limit (safety cap) exceeded for this endpoint + plan.

Retry-After.description: Seconds until the daily rate-limit window resets. Present only on this 429 response.

post.summary: LLM analysis of a borderline / surprising score (L2c, any plan — Anthropic BYOK)
post.description: Asks the LLM to inspect a score that's near a verdict boundary or contradicts operator intuition. Returns a narrative + a structured `limiting_class` taxonomy entry. Requires the tenant's own Anthropic key (PUT /v1/tenant/llm-key) — no longer plan-gated.

503.description: No Anthropic key configured for this tenant

post.summary: Climate projections across a portfolio of spots (Scale)
Climate adaptation report for an operator (Scale)
post.description: Combines projections across a portfolio + qualitative summary of which dimensions are likely to bind (wind shifts, water-temp shifts, etc.). Designed as input for a tourism-board adaptation plan.

post.summary: Submit station observations for data assimilation (Pro+)
post.description: Push tenant-station observations (wind / wave / temperature / etc.) into the 0-6h assimilation window. The optimal-interpolation blending pulls them into forecast samples for nearby spots, improving short-horizon skill.

422.description: Validation error / observation in future / variable mismatch

post.summary: Register a tenant observation station

get.summary: Recent observations for a tenant station
get.description: Returns up to `limit` most-recent observations submitted for the station (tenant-scoped). Useful for the tenant's own dashboard / debugging feed. Requires the `score:read` scope.

200.description: Most-recent observations for this station (descending by observedAt)

post.summary: Self-service tenant signup (no auth)
post.description: Public endpoint, IP-rate-limited (3 attempts / 24h / IP). Creates a tenant + sends a magic-link to the contact email. Always returns 202 on success — never reveals whether an email is already registered. Optional Cloudflare Turnstile token strengthens the gate.

acceptTerms.description: Must be true — records ToS / Privacy / DPA acceptance.

202.description: Accepted — magic-link sent if signup valid

get.summary: Public Goable Sustainability Index (no auth, JSON-LD)
get.description: Public JSON-LD artefact of the Goable Sustainability Index (CC BY 4.0). Session-weighted 0-100 index across zones plus per-zone breakdowns. Governed by k-anonymity (default k≥10) + a 90-day publication lag in the underlying reader — no additional privacy work required for the public surface. Content-Type: application/ld+json. Edge-cached for 5 minutes.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Inclusive start of the reporting period.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Exclusive end of the reporting period.

parameters.name: zoneKm
parameters.description: Zone grid cell edge length in km (default: reader-configured).

parameters.name: k
parameters.description: k-anonymity threshold: zones with fewer than k sessions are suppressed.

get.summary: Public Stream F forecast verification export (no auth, JSONL)
get.description: Streamed newline-delimited JSON (`application/x-ndjson`) — one anonymised (activity × 1km² grid × weekly bucket) skill cell per line, followed by a trailing metadata line. CC BY 4.0. Governance: k≥10 contributor floor + 90-day publication lag + `research_eligible=true` filter enforced in the SQL reader.

200.description: Streamed JSONL — one cell per line + trailing meta line

get.summary: Public L15 Difficulty Atlas export (no auth, JSONL)
get.description: Streamed newline-delimited JSON (`application/x-ndjson`) — one anonymised (activity × sub-spot × dimension) difficulty row per line, followed by a trailing metadata line. CC BY 4.0. First openly-available intrinsic-difficulty measurement for outdoor activities. Governance mirrors Stream F: k≥10 contributors + 90-day publication lag.

200.description: Streamed JSONL — one atlas row per line + trailing meta line

get.description: Live coverage numbers for the open activity catalogue (CC BY 4.0). Returns totals across activities · sub-spots · clusters · regions · countries plus a per-activity breakdown with country codes + status (`seeded` ≥10 sub-spots / `partial` 1-9 / `empty` 0). Edge-cached for 5 minutes — new sub-spots ship via PR + release cycle, not at runtime. Same JSON the /catalog landing renders; expose this surface for marketing / partner sites that want to embed live numbers without scraping HTML.

200.description: Live coverage stats from the @goable-io/profiles-catalog package

computedAt.description: ISO timestamp the bundled JSON was computed at

byActivity.description: One entry per base profile, sorted DESC by subSpotCount.

lastUpdatedAt.description: Newest commit touching the activity dir (null when no sub-spots yet)

post.summary: Report a standalone activity outcome
post.description: Submit an observed outcome for an activity session not tied to a specific /v1/score call — the operator-reported behavioural signal behind the calibration + research datasets. For an outcome linked to a specific scored session, use POST /v1/score/{sessionId}/outcome instead. Requires the `outcomes:write` scope (live keys carry it by default; test keys don't).

audit_log_id.description: Optional link back to a scoring_audit_log row.

202.description: Accepted (queued for the next calibration batch)

get.summary: Export the caller's own score + outcome audit history
get.description: Tenant-scoped export of your own scoring_audit_log activity (one row per /v1/score call, with any linked outcome inline), date-range filtered. The tenant is always the calling API key's tenant — there is no way to request another tenant's data. Outcomes reported via the free-standing POST /v1/outcomes (i.e. not linked to a specific score via audit_log_id) are not included. Offset-paginated; `X-Total-Count` on every response carries the total row count for the window.

200.description: CSV (format=csv) or JSON (format=json, default) export of the window.

422.description: Validation error, `to` before `from`, or WINDOW_TOO_LARGE (range exceeds 366 days)

get.summary: Fetch the current published legal document (no auth)
get.description: Public read of the currently-published version of a legal document (Terms of Service, Privacy Policy, DPA, SLA, Acceptable Use, Cookie Policy). Returns the full body + content hash + published timestamp. Used by the signup flow + marketing site to render always-current legal copy without hardcoding it.

200.description: The current published document of the requested kind

404.description: Unknown document kind, or no published document
